description:
The image captures a serene night scene in a living room bathed in soft light from a window in the background. The room is dark, creating an intimate atmosphere. On the left side of the frame, a small table stands against the wall. A single blue candle and a glass of water are placed on it, their shapes silhouetted against the dimly lit surroundings. 

To the right, a couch draped with a white sheet invites relaxation. The fabric's texture contrasts with the smooth surface of the table. The window in the background is adorned with yellow curtains that hang still, adding a warm hue to the otherwise cool tones of the room.

The perspective of the photo suggests it was taken from someone seated on the couch, perhaps enjoying a quiet moment of reflection or simply taking in the tranquil ambiance of the room. The overall composition of the image evokes a sense of calm and solitude, a private sanctuary within four walls.
